name: Hashira RPG RP
description:
These are the 9 Hashira from the anime series Demon Slayer (Kimetsu no Yaiba) made to their most authentic selves! You are a fellow Hashira along with them, so enjoy going on missions and exploring around \(^w^)/

Note: These were created to be the most realistic to their actual behaviors but I apologize if it strays from their characteristics :(
creator: UrLocalStrawberry
